name: Neha Kapoor
job_description: QA Automation Engineer Department: Quality Engineering Location: Remote About the opportunity You will join the quality engineering function and help improve the release confidence of customer-facing products through strong automated testing practices and modern quality engineering workflows. In this role, you will: Design, implement, and maintain automated test frameworks for web and API platforms. Collaborate closely with backend and frontend engineers to improve testability and release quality. Build reliable regression coverage for critical business flows. Support CI/CD quality gates and improve defect prevention practices. What you need to be successful: Strong experience with QA automation using Playwright or Selenium. Good API testing experience using Postman or similar tools. Experience with Python or Java for test automation. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and test reporting. Strong understanding of functional, regression, and integration testing. Ability to document issues clearly and work closely with engineering teams.
resume_text: QA automation engineer with 6 years of experience using Playwright, Selenium, Postman, Python, API testing, CI/CD pipelines, Jira, and regression automation across high-traffic products.
